betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Conveyor Sorters§f

§aRoute items to specific conveyor belts based on filter settings!§f

§bConveyor Sorters§f have six outputs with five filter slots each. They have no buffer — items are routed instantly. Each output has three modes:

§b• Whitelist§f: route if the item matches the filter
§b• Blacklist§f: route if the item does not match
§b• Wildcard§f: route if no other filter matches

§6Crafting§f:
§b• 4×§f Pneumatic Piston
§b• 4×§f Insulator
§b• 1×§f Integrated Circuit Board
→ Conveyor Sorter

§cRequires§f: §bIntegrated Circuit Board§f, which needs §bSilicon§f from the Electric Arc Furnace. If unavailable, use an inserter into a crate with multiple filtered ejectors as a substitute.

§eTip§f: Sorters are especially useful with centrifuges that produce multiple outputs. Route each product to a different belt for easy distribution to storage!
